title: Mebahel's Creatures - Dwarven Automatons
description: Mebahel’s Creatures — Dwarven Automatons introduces a complete faction of hostile machines inspired by Dwemer technology from The Elder Scroll Games — blending steam power, gears, lost engineering, and primitive artificial intelligence.
body:
# ⚙️ Mebahel’s Creatures — Dwarven Automatons

An ancient mechanical civilization rises once more.

**Mebahel’s Creatures — Dwarven Automatons** introduces a complete faction of hostile machines inspired by Dwemer technology from the Elder Scrolls games — blending steam power, gears, lost engineering, and primitive artificial intelligence.

Explore abandoned ruins, face deadly automated defenses, and uncover remnants of a forgotten industrial empire designed to eliminate intruders without mercy.

Inspired by the automatons of **Skyrim**, this mod reimagines them for Minecraft with advanced AI, high-quality animations, and exploration-focused gameplay.

***

## 📦 Required Mods

### Forge / NeoForge

The following mods are required:

*   [Mebahel's API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mebahels-api/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=hide)
*   [Sinytra Connector](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector)
*   [Forgified Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgified-fabric-api)
*   [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

### Fabric

The following mods are required:

*   [Mebahel's API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mebahels-api/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=hide)
*   [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
*   [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

***

## ⭐ Key Features

### Dwarven Automatons

A full lineup of ancient mechanical enemies:

*   **Dwarven Spider** — fast scouting unit capable of surprise attacks
*   **Dwarven Spider Guardian** — a stronger version of the Dwarven Spider
*   **Dwarven Sphere** — compact machine that deploys into melee or ranged mode
*   **Dwarven Centurion** — the strongest of the Dwarven automatons

Each automaton features detailed mechanical animations, transformation states, and unique combat roles.

***

### ⚔️ Dwemer Weapons & Equipment

Forge powerful gear using ancient Dwemer technology:

*   New weapons crafted from **Dwemer Metal Ingots**
*   Durable equipment inspired by Dwemer engineering
*   High-tier materials obtained from ruins and automatons
*   Designed to complement late-game exploration and combat

***

### Dwemer Blocks & Building Materials

Build your own mechanical structures using Dwemer architecture:

*   New decorative and structural blocks made from Dwemer materials
*   Industrial-style metallic building components
*   Perfect for steampunk, ancient technology, or underground builds
*   Thematic blocks matching Dwemer ruins and machinery

***

### ⚙️ Ancient Technology & Loot

Discover remnants of Dwemer engineering:

*   Rare mechanical components
*   Ancient materials
*   Lost technological artifacts
*   Crafting resources tied to advanced progression

These items are primarily found within automaton structures.

***

### Shared Multiplayer Loot Chests

Special chests designed for mechanical dungeons:

*   Independent loot for each player
*   Fully multiplayer compatible
*   Supports both vanilla and modded loot tables
*   Immersive spawn animations
*   Prevents structure loot from being exhausted

Perfect for cooperative gameplay and servers.

***

## 🏛️ New Structures

### Blackreach

Blackreach is an immense, naturally lit cavern inhabited by ancient Dwarven Automatons and containing the ruins of a Dwemer city.

These ruins offer high-risk, high-reward exploration.

***

### Raldbthar

Raldbthar is a medium-sized Dwarven ruin inhabited by ancient Dwarven Automatons.

These ruins offer medium-risk, medium-reward exploration.

***

## 🏛️ Notes & Credits

*   This mod is actively developed
*   Fully compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer
*   Feedback and suggestions are welcome
* Join the community on Discord:  
[https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB](https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB)
*   Some Dwemer structures are based on builds by  
    [fonta59 – Skyrim in Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/skyrim-map-by-fonta59-skyrim-tes-interiors-with-download-1-20/), used with permission
